articles.author: Amanda Chu
articles.title: RFK Jr. has turned corporate America’s name to mud, POLITICO Poll finds - Politico
articles.description: Most Americans, especially Republicans, want to regulate food and drug makers now.
articles.content: Big American brands from Coca-Cola to Kraft Heinz are getting in line, changing their recipes to accommodate Kennedy, while others from Dunkin to McDonalds have absorbed Kennedy broadsides. Drug comp… [+9364 chars]
